metadata.title: NBA Site vs Database Gap Analysis

database_entities.name: analytics_shooting_efficiency
database_entities.note: loc_x/loc_y shot data with league averages

database_entities.name: fact_player_career
database_entities.note: BBR-canonical career source; agg_player_career is documented as corrupt for some players

database_entities.name: fact_playoff_series
database_entities.endpoint: GET /api/teams/:id/playoff-series (caveat: wins/losses re-derived from game.wl_home per AGENTS.md)

database_entities.name: analytics_player_general_splits
database_entities.note: split_type=Location only; W/L, Pre/Post ASG, Conf/Div absent

database_entities.name: analytics_team_season_summary
database_entities.note: UI sources conference/division from here because dim_team.conference/division are NULL

database_entities.name: agg_player_career
database_entities.note: documented as corrupt for some players (Wes Unseld verified)

database_entities.name: agg_all_time_leaders
database_entities.note: perfect base for All-Time Career Leaders view

database_entities.name: fact_franchise_leaders
database_entities.note: single row per franchise with PTS/AST/REB/BLK/STL leaders

database_entities.name: dim_team
database_entities.note: conference and division columns are NULL for all 72 rows

website_routes.label: Draft & Awards
website_routes.filters_sorts: year dropdown (77 years), award-type dropdown (10 types)

website_routes.label: Search Results
website_routes.note: Hidden tab; only reachable via navigateToDetail('search', id) from the global header search

coverage_matrix.gaps: could filter by award_type in profile
no per-zone SHOT chart; only tabular
could be rank badge on bio header
app uses agg_player_career (corrupt for some players)
no coach detail page; no coaching tree
could add net-rating sort, per-lineup shot-zone splits
could pair with team own four-factors
Home/Away only in DB; not surfaced
30 seasons in DB; UI shows 5; no Cup view surfaced
conference bracket with clinch flags, GB, magic numbers
warehouse-build gap, not fixable from this repo (per AGENTS.md)

high_priority_views.name: League Leaders (Season + All-Time)
high_priority_views.db_source: fact_season_leader (11154 rows × 60+ stat_keys × 79 seasons), agg_all_time_leaders (4888 players)
high_priority_views.rationale: BBRef-style first-page view; largest data gap in the app

medium_priority_views.name: League Rank badges on Player Profile
Home/Away Splits (Player & Team)
medium_priority_views.rationale: only Location split populated in DB

medium_priority_views.name: Player Traits / Category tiles on Home

low_priority_views.name: Multi-player Wowy combinations
low_priority_views.db_source: would need multi-player on/off joins (not in schema)

missing_data_filters: Conference filter on Teams list (NULL in dim_team.conference)
Active vs. all-time toggle on Players list
Era filter on player search (season range)

recommended_views.name: League Leaders (Season + All-Time)
recommended_views.description: Top 25 players per stat for selected season; All-Time top 50 across career totals
recommended_views.example_sql: SELECT season, stat_key, stat_value, person_id, player_name FROM fact_season_leader WHERE season='2025-26' AND stat_key='pts' ORDER BY stat_value DESC LIMIT 25;

recommended_views.name: All-Time Franchise Leaders
recommended_views.description: Per-franchise leaders for PTS, AST, REB, BLK, STL with career totals
recommended_views.example_sql: SELECT team_id, pts_player, pts, ast_player, ast, reb_player, reb, blk_player, blk, stl_player, stl FROM fact_franchise_leaders ORDER BY team_id;

recommended_views.name: League Rank badges on Player Profile
recommended_views.description: Small rank-in-league glyphs next to per-season stat columns
recommended_views.example_sql: SELECT season_id, rank_pts, rank_ast, rank_reb, rank_stl, rank_blk, rank_fg_pct, rank_fg3_pct, rank_ft_pct, rank_eff FROM fact_player_season_ranks WHERE player_id=? ORDER BY season_id DESC LIMIT 10;

recommended_views.name: Draft Value / Career Success by Pick
recommended_views.description: Best career outcomes by draft round/pick; filterable by era
recommended_views.example_sql: SELECT overall_pick, player_name, position, country, career_gp, career_ppg, career_rpg, career_apg, career_fg_pct, career_fg3_pct, seasons_played FROM analytics_draft_value WHERE round_number=1 ORDER BY career_ppg DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 50;

recommended_views.name: Franchise History tab
recommended_views.description: Championships, division/conference titles, total wins per franchise
recommended_views.example_sql: SELECT team_city, team_name, years, games, wins, losses, win_pct, po_appearances, div_titles, conf_titles, league_titles, franchise_age_years FROM agg_team_franchise ORDER BY league_titles DESC, wins DESC;

recommended_views.name: Head-to-Head Team Matchups
recommended_views.description: Team A vs Team B record per season with avg margin
recommended_views.example_sql: SELECT opponent_abbr, season_year, games_played, wins, losses, avg_pts_scored, avg_pts_allowed, avg_margin FROM analytics_head_to_head WHERE team_id=? ORDER BY season_year DESC, opponent_abbr;

recommended_views.name: Home/Away Splits (Player & Team)
recommended_views.description: Side-by-side comparison of home vs away stats with delta vs league avg
recommended_views.example_sql: SELECT group_value AS location, gp, w, l, w_pct, min, pts, reb, ast, fg_pct, fg3_pct, ft_pct, plus_minus, w_pct_delta, pts_delta FROM analytics_player_general_splits WHERE player_id=? AND split_type='Location' ORDER BY season_year DESC, season_type;

recommended_views.name: Player-vs-Player Comparison
recommended_views.description: Side-by-side comparison of two players across season stats, advanced, per36, per100, on/off, shot splits, similar

recommended_views.name: Coach Detail Page
recommended_views.description: Coach profile with career record, seasons coached, teams
recommended_views.example_sql: SELECT coach_id, team_id, season_year, first_name, last_name, coach_type, is_assistant FROM dim_coach WHERE coach_id=? ORDER BY season_year;

recommended_views.name: Estimated Advanced Metrics card
recommended_views.description: Duck Estimated pre-tracking-completion advanced metrics for player profile
recommended_views.example_sql: SELECT season_year, e_off_rating, e_def_rating, e_net_rating, e_pace, e_ast_ratio, e_oreb_pct, e_dreb_pct, e_reb_pct, e_tov_pct, e_usg_pct FROM fact_player_estimated_metrics WHERE player_id=? ORDER BY season_year;

recommended_views.name: Player Traits / Category tiles
recommended_views.description: Pre-sorted player cards by trait (Best Scorers, Best Shooters, Best Passers)
recommended_views.example_sql: SELECT p.full_name, aps.career_pts, aps.career_ppg, aps.career_gp FROM agg_player_career aps JOIN dim_player p USING (player_id) WHERE aps.career_gp >= 200 ORDER BY aps.career_ppg DESC LIMIT 25;

recommended_views.name: Shot Chart Heat Map
recommended_views.description: Visual x/y heat map of shot attempts and FG% by zone, with league-average overlay
recommended_views.example_sql: SELECT FLOOR(loc_x/5)*5 AS bin_x, FLOOR(loc_y/5)*5 AS bin_y, COUNT(*) AS attempts, SUM(shot_made_flag) AS makes, AVG(shot_made_flag) AS fg_pct FROM analytics_shooting_efficiency WHERE player_id=? AND season_year=? GROUP BY bin_x, bin_y ORDER BY bin_y, bin_x;

recommended_views.name: Play-by-Play Event Viewer
recommended_views.example_sql: SELECT game_id, period, clock, home_team_abbreviation, visitor_team_abbreviation, home_score, visitor_score, neutral_description, score_margin FROM fact_pbp_events WHERE game_id=? ORDER BY event_num;

recommended_views.name: Possession Finder
recommended_views.description: Query possessions by start type, score margin, time, period

recommended_views.name: Clutch Splits (per game)
recommended_views.description: Per-game stats filtered to clutch time (period>=4 AND |score_margin|<=5)

recommended_views.name: Lineup Optimizer / Simulator
recommended_views.description: Given 5 players, find closest matching 5-man lineup in agg_lineup_efficiency
recommended_views.example_sql: SELECT * FROM agg_lineup_efficiency WHERE group_id IN (?,?,?) LIMIT 50;

recommended_views.name: Betting / Odds View
recommended_views.description: Pre-game + live odds lines per game
recommended_views.example_sql: SELECT game_id, game_date, sportsbook, spread, over_under, moneyline_home, moneyline_away FROM fact_game_betting_lines WHERE game_id=? ORDER BY game_date DESC LIMIT 50;

recommended_views.name: Game Finder
recommended_views.example_sql: SELECT g.game_id, g.game_date, g.matchup, pgs.pts FROM game g JOIN fact_player_game_log pgs USING (game_id) WHERE pgs.player_id=? AND pgs.pts>=40 ORDER BY g.game_date DESC;

pages_scraped: Most Points in a Triple Double results
top_patterns: Answer cards with team colors + headshot
web_research_sources.notes: NL parsing is out of scope; pre-baked query buttons and glossary are easy wins
Percentile ranks are trivial in DuckDB; transition/halfcourt/garbage-time need PBP-grain data the UI doesn't currently query
Existing getSimilarPlayers is exactly the Doppelganger Finder pattern
Most patterns need possession-grain data the UI doesn't currently query; on/off is already covered

quick_wins.name: League Rank badges on Player Profile
Standings: surface all 30 seasons + Cup type

medium_effort.name: Player Traits / Category tiles on Home
Fantasy Points / Rolling Averages on Player Profile

observed_errors.note: photo not in local photo store

notable_findings.title: dim_team.conference and dim_team.division are NULL for all 72 rows
notable_findings.evidence: SELECT conference, division, COUNT(*) FROM dim_team GROUP BY 1,2; returns only NULL,NULL,72
notable_findings.impact: The UI sources conference/division from analytics_team_season_summary instead; future code that joins dim_team.conference directly will silently fail
notable_findings.fix: Either backfill dim_team or update dim_team.conference/division to source from analytics_team_season_summary

notable_findings.title: game table stops 2023-06-12; gap to 2025-26
notable_findings.impact: fact_standings covers 2025-26 but the underlying `game` table doesn't, so cross-joins may miss recent games
notable_findings.fix: Warehouse-build side; per AGENTS.md not fixable from this repo

notable_findings.title: analytics_player_general_splits only has Location splits
notable_findings.evidence: SELECT split_type, group_set, COUNT(*) FROM analytics_player_general_splits GROUP BY 1,2; returns only Location,By Location,97631
notable_findings.impact: W/L, Pre/Post ASG, Conf/Div, Month, Day-of-Week split types are absent despite the column structure supporting them
notable_findings.fix: Warehouse-build side; per AGENTS.md not fixable from this repo

notable_findings.title: 21 warehouse tables are empty (0 rows)
notable_findings.evidence: fact_team_splits=0, fact_team_matchups=0, fact_team_lineups_overall=0, fact_team_matchups_detail=0, fact_team_matchups_shot_detail=0, fact_team_general_splits_detail=0, fact_team_shooting_splits_detail=0, fact_team_pt_shots_detail=0, fact_team_pt_reb_detail=0, fact_team_lineups_detail=0, fact_team_pt_tracking=0, fact_team_player_dashboard=0, fact_team_game_hustle=0, fact_team_hof=0, fact_team_social_sites=0, fact_gravity_leaders=0, fact_hustle_availability=0, fact_homepage=0, fact_homepage_detail=0, fact_homepage_leaders=0, fact_homepage_leaders_detail=0
notable_findings.impact: All documented in AGENTS.md as warehouse-build gaps, not fixable from this repo

notable_findings.title: agg_player_career is corrupt for some players
notable_findings.evidence: AGENTS.md: 'verified via Wes Unseld's career GP'
notable_findings.impact: Player profile career summary uses the corrupt agg_player_career; should use fact_player_career (BBR canonical)
notable_findings.fix: Update queries.ts to use fact_player_career in getPlayerProfile.career

phases_completed: Phase 3 Web research via firecrawl (librarian subagent)

background_tasks_used.purpose: Firecrawl research for NBA analytics UI inspiration
